body:
# Continuous build Changelog

- Release tag: `continuous`
- Target commit: `0e553ff27f3ba7eda893eb2d14bbf10f8dc31507`
- Previous marker: `f39866dbd5c512f2e6dc9f413fb5d1381cb5a325`
- Generated: 2026-07-15T11:06:15.917Z
- Compare: https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/compare/f39866dbd5c512f2e6dc9f413fb5d1381cb5a325...0e553ff27f3ba7eda893eb2d14bbf10f8dc31507

## Commits

- [6a7092f](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/6a7092f9412a4a6ad4b639e133c633a01dd531a6) Autosave the working session and add Open/Save Dungeon to the File menu.
- [f70973b](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/f70973b35cfeee95c13a3663d7a8c19823958d7d) Merge origin/main, unifying the two Open Dungeon implementations.
- [79befff](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/79befffce23d33472cd6a62298f1ecc3f078dab5) Merge pull request #184 from Zuljita/feature/session-autosave
- [b96ce46](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/b96ce46f81cf2484f6c673b899c53780a42d8565) Compute sheet-based CER for NPCs and trait-based CER for enhanced monsters
- [fc254bf](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/fc254bf2fd6549616cbc324a47a62b1d0ccce805) Fix app boot hang in hidden/throttled tabs (#185). (#186)
- [44e1143](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/44e11439877e957ab145b5f4b79ad9d9987db470) Merge pull request #187 from Zuljita/feature/cer-sheet-based-npc
- [6f848bd](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/6f848bdaf01c2925db6a33cd62f05f312f22c8fd) Add named opponents and threat-class CER budget targeting
- [53a2abf](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/53a2abf73343957891cbcd0d8b1e6f1610939abb) Merge pull request #188 from Zuljita/feature/named-opponents-cer-budgets
- [a650ad5](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/a650ad5554fa894410763c3e45d79b9df9ac72f1) Expand Stage Manager banter for tags, categories, and missing monsters. (#189)
- [39c9a1e](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/39c9a1e1ee605625d56097fa8717f2fff357fe33) Make Stage Manager dismissable, resizable, and tear-off capable (#174). (#190)
- [133b0b9](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/133b0b926e0beb128720812a941c8f678fdc4228) Document tag catalog authoring vs runtime LLM context budgets (#167). (#191)
- [e37bfbd](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/e37bfbd9871c2081e00407ea8cab5928ddb9f4af) Add undeclared-tag audit script for catalog hygiene (#161). (#192)
- [572866b](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/572866b43806dff2479581f8152924bd5260b926) Declare high-value generation tags that were silently dropping (#162). (#193)
- [f57b2ef](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/f57b2ef89846308f09be899d2ec0e686c4cf73bc) Prompt context budgets and closed tag shortlists for LLM calls (#165) (#194)
- [8ab72a7](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/8ab72a7ef773b7c1fc80ecb7e37b890761b4d001) Wire EraStack, adventure frame, and room cards to shortlisted LLM context (#195)
- [70a5b08](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/70a5b081acf13400970a585cf2659dd796c06988) Expand Stage Manager banter for silent tags, traps, rooms, and set pieces. (#196)
- [0fcd07f](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/0fcd07f3420088e21d8002b7741fed7aa931f705) Expand monster role and lens packages beyond the Phase 2 stub (#151). (#197)
- [97a2e23](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/97a2e23b864ba51d66822991fd5aed9a4f3267a8) Add offline tag harvest to review-artifact authoring pipeline (#163) (#198)
- [0e553ff](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/0e553ff27f3ba7eda893eb2d14bbf10f8dc31507) Add optional generation↔art-pack tag crosswalk (#164). (#199)
name: Continuous build
